channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Swift nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 NoopApp/noop (549 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: NoopApp

📝 Repository: NoopApp/noop

📄 Descrizione: Offline WHOOP companion — pair your strap over Bluetooth, keep all data on your own device. No cloud, no account, no subscription.

⭐ Stelle: 549

🍴 Forks: 506

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-07T17:03:02Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-09T06:00:09Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: iliyami

📝 Repository: iliyami/MacClean

⭐ Stelle: 89

🍴 Forks: 6

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: appkit cleanmymac cleanmymac-alternative darwin disk-cleaner duplicate-finder homebrew-cask mac-cleaner mac-utility macos macos-app malware-scanner no-subscription open-source privacy swift swift6 swiftui system-cleaner uninstaller

📜 Licenza: BSD 3-Clause "New" or "Revised" License

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-02T01:56:26Z

item.title: 📝 TY-teo/StayAwake (35 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: TY-teo

📝 Repository: TY-teo/StayAwake

📄 Descrizione: Native macOS menu bar app that keeps your MacBook awake for AI coding agents - Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cursor - even with the lid closed. Open source (MIT), IOPMAssertion + scoped sudoers rule for password-free pmset, timed auto-off, login item, crash-safe self-heal. Built for overnight agent runs and clamshell mode without an external display.

⭐ Stelle: 35

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: agentic-workflow ai-agents amphetamine-alternative apple-silicon caffeinate clamshell-mode claude-code cursor developer-tools iopmassertion lid-closed macos menu-bar-app openai-codex overnight pmset prevent-sleep stay-awake sudoers swiftui

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-31T03:25:02Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-04T02:01:50Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 ddasy/SleepBar (20 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ddasy

📝 Repository: ddasy/SleepBar

📄 Descrizione: 🌙 Instantly switch macOS screen timeout from your menu bar — no more digging through System Settings. Preset timers, instant lock, keep awake, display off, or auto re-lock after you step away. Perfect for meetings, cafés & shared workspaces. 菜单栏一键切换屏幕超时，不用再翻系统设置：预设倒计时、立即锁屏、保持唤醒、熄屏、离开自动重锁。开会、咖啡厅、共享办公必备。

⭐ Stelle: 20

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: appkit auto-lock caffeinate display-sleep keep-awake macos macos-app menu-bar menubar productivity screen-lock sleep-timer swift

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-03T07:32:11Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-07T02:02:00Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
